items.name_en: Style No.: CH537 Coach HANNA Series. Full of high-end feel and artisan details! Especially the side oil-edge pleated design gives the shape a gentle yet three-dimensional look. The capacity speaks for itself, continuing the traditional bucket bag's large capacity and functionality. Dual detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile. Made of cowhide, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.

items.name_en: Model: CE331 Coach Baguette STUDIO BAGUETTE. 20cm bottom size, the perfect charming length, and the height is just right for essentials like a phone, lipstick, and keys. Equipped with 2 detachable shoulder straps, an underarm strap and a casual crossbody strap. Classic style, simple silhouette. Solid colors are basic colors, matching any outfit. A versatile all-purpose style.
